text: 13. Hole opening protection procedures are to be submitted for review and approval to the Contractor for approval prior to implementation. At a minimum, all plywood covers will extend 1.5 times the size of the opening. Any opening larger than eighteen (18) inches will have additional support framing as required to be secured for safe traffic. All temporary plywood covers will be stencil painted to read 'DANGER HOLE COVER, DO NOT REMOVE.'
